# iLuau — Local MCP Plugin for Roblox Studio

> iLuau is a local MCP plugin that lets the Codex AI agent control a live
> Roblox Studio session — inspect the selection tree, read and edit properties,
> attributes, and tags, create and delete instances, and chat with Codex from a
> panel inside Studio.

## What it does

iLuau provides a local bridge between Codex and the Roblox Studio DataModel.
A local MCP server (Node.js) exposes Studio actions as MCP tools and hosts a
dashboard; a dockable Studio plugin executes the queued jobs in a live session.

- Local MCP server (stdio) for Codex
- Dockable panel in Roblox Studio
- Selection tree with filter and expand/collapse
- Property editor with history and favorites
- Attributes and Tags editing
- Codex chat embedded in the Studio panel (no screen switching)
- Local dashboard for bridge status and job queue

## Installation

1. Install Node.js 18 or higher.
2. From `plugins/iluau/`, install dependencies if needed: `npm install`.
3. Point your Codex client at the MCP server: `node ./server/index.js`
   (the same process hosts the local dashboard on `http://127.0.0.1:3099/`).
4. Copy `plugins/iluau/studio-plugin/iLuau.plugin.lua` to the Roblox Studio
   plugins folder and restart Studio.

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 18
- Roblox Studio (with Allow HTTP Requests enabled)
- Codex (CLI or app) as the MCP client

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/diogo2806/iluau
- Issues: https://github.com/diogo2806/iluau/issues
